signals.raw:
Raptors Place 4 Players on Waivers Today | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Toronto Raptors confirmed today they placed the contracts of Olivier Sarr, David Roddy, Jared Rhoden, and A.J. Lawson on waivers, plus ended Ulrich Chomche's two-way contract—roster moves ahead of their playoff series vs. Cavaliers (down 0-2).[5]
